titleStmt.title: SII 41.252: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 252. (A.R. No. 470 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Mallikarjunadeva-Maharaya, son of Devaraya-Maharaya. Saka 1373, Pradmōdūta = 1450 A.D.

summary.p: Gift of the services of some tiruviḷakku-maṉṟāḍi for maintaining four lamps in the temple. The gift was made by the Sādam officers Aḻagiyanayinār and another person for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭalecura Ariya(r)rāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ teva
rāya mahāirāyar kumārar mallikāṟcunateva mahāirāyaṟku cellā niṉṟa cakāttam
1000 3 100 7 10 3l mel cellā niṉṟa piṟamotūta varuḻam Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkā
ṭuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tirununtāviḷakkukku mallikāṟcunarāyaṟku tanmamāka cātamāṇikkanāyinār A ntiranātarum Aḻakiya nāyinārum tanmamāka
viṭṭa tiruviḷakku maṉṟāṭi vaṭukakoṉ Akakkoṉ pottaracaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum ko koṉ pottaṉtāṭai veṅki Inta kuṭimaikaḷai Appan
caṉṉatiyile nāḷtoṟum nālu tiruviḷakku cantiṟātittavaraiyum niṟceyippu ne mum kaṇakkaṉpaṭṭiyile potorum tāṉattār yiṭṭa
taraviṉpaṭi Iṟuttuvarak kaṭavāṉākavum Inta kuṭikaḷukku Akitam paṇṇiṉār Uṇṭākil keṅkaikaraiyil kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile
pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku cammatittu taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇi kuṭuttom Ivai māṇikkanāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Attanātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aḻakiyanāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
